title: vstuff
description: vstuff, an addon to vs2 & create which adds ropes, and more! requires vs2 & create
body:
_VStuff is a VS2 & Create addon that adds rope related things and other create related blocks._

# 3.0.1 OUT NOW!!!
Join our discord for more updates

### FAQ:
#### Do you plan to add phys ropes / ropes with collision? 
Yes! In fact, we are currently working on them, you can find videos in our discord. We plan to implement these with VStuff 0.4.0
#### Do you plan to release a version for fabric? 
Fabric is possible for us, but is currently a low priority. One of our developers, Jcm, has plans to work on one, but we'd appreciate any help if youre interested!
#### Do you plan to update to 1.21.1?
Yes, once VS officially releases for 1.21.1, we will also update, though it is also not really a high priority

![VStuff Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1973308adf71ceab26bab0a395007df88378e462.png)
